slides.headline: Cross-train your backup certifying official
slides.body: In three weeks, three milestones, one confident backup certifying official.

slides.headline: Identify a backup
slides.body: Select a staff member who can handle certifications independently.

slides.headline: Develop a training plan
slides.body: Create a tailored training schedule covering all relevant topics.
bullets: Focus on specific areas of need

slides.headline: Assess and certify
slides.body: Evaluate the backup's readiness and certify them.

slides.headline: Your VA form 22-1999
slides.body: Ensure your backup certifying official is familiar with this form.

slides.headline: Complete the training
slides.body: By the end of three weeks, your backup should be fully trained.
Take the next step to train your backup certifying official. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Cross-train your backup certifying official in three weeks, three milestones, and one confident certifier. Ready your team for certification responsibilities.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is the third slide, which is slightly less visually engaging compared to the others. A small icon or graphic could enhance its visual appeal.
